summary: NewsPage (Perplexity Discover style) testing completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend UI features are working correctly. Fixed Flask icon import error (changed to FlaskConical).
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: 'Flask' icon not exported from lucide-react - changed to 'FlaskConical'
seed_data_creation: News articles created via NewsAPI refresh
context_for_next_testing_agent: NewsPage with Perplexity Discover style is fully functional. NewsAPI.org integration works for both France (using 'everything' endpoint) and US (using 'top-headlines' endpoint).

news_page_design.title: PASS - 'Les actualités du jour' title displayed
news_page_design.featured_article: PASS - Large featured article with image on right, text on left
news_page_design.article_cards: PASS - Grid of article cards with images, titles, descriptions, dates, sources
news_page_design.category_filters: PASS - 7 category filter buttons (Toutes, Général, Business, Tech, Science, Santé, Sports, Divertissement)
news_page_design.region_selector: PASS - Dropdown with France, États-Unis, Royaume-Uni, Allemagne
news_page_design.refresh_button: PASS - Actualiser button fetches new articles from NewsAPI

article_modal.opens_on_click: PASS - Modal opens as overlay (no URL navigation)
article_modal.hero_image: PASS - Large image at top of modal
article_modal.back_button: PASS - 'Retour aux actualités' button closes modal
article_modal.read_on_site: PASS - 'Lire sur le site' button with external link
article_modal.source_info: PASS - Source name with 'Source originale' label
article_modal.discover_also: PASS - 'Découvrir aussi' section with 4 related articles
